sub_modules.ifft16_bit_reverse: Combinational bit-reversal index generator used to load DIT FFT/IFFT memory in bit-reversed order.
sub_modules.ifft16_pair_index: Combinational stage/j/group decoder that generates butterfly operand addresses, twiddle index, and loop boundary flags.
sub_modules.ifft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for N=16 using the required cosine and positive sine table.
sub_modules.ifft16_butterfly_q15: Combinational radix-2 complex butterfly with rounded Q1.15 complex twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.ifft16_output_scale: Combinational final output scaler; divides IFFT results by 16 using arithmetic right shift.
